description: Create an interactive physics simulation of light refraction in GeoGebra that demonstrates Snell's Law (n1 * sin(theta1) = n2 * sin(theta2)). The construction must feature two sliders named 'n1' and 'n2' (range 1.0 to 2.5) representing refractive indices, a light source point, and an incident ray approaching a horizontal interface at the x-axis. Ensure the refracted ray updates dynamically and correctly handles Total Internal Reflection (TIR) by disappearing or becoming undefined when the critical angle is exceeded. Save the file as 'refraction_lab.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
